About Miro | Meet the team | Our mission - Miro | The Innovation Workspace May 19 Canvas 26 registration is open. Get set to transform how your team builds with AI. SAVE YOUR SPOT San Francisco The visual workspace for innovation Miro provides a visual workspace for innovation that enables distributed teams of any size to dream, design, and build the future together. Our mission is to empower teams to create the next big thing Our mission is to empower teams to create the next big thing The origins of Miro In 2011, Andrey Khusid needed a way for his design agency to communicate ideas to clients who werenât in the same room. That first iteration, called RealtimeBoard, quickly evolved into the robust visual workspace for innovation we now know as Miro. Today, more than 100 million users in 250,000 organizations including Nike, IKEA, Deloitte, WPP, and Cisco depend on Miro to improve product development collaboration, to speed up time to market, and to make sure that new products and services deliver on customer needs. Miro's visual workspace enables distributed teams to come together to develop strategy, design products and services, and manage processes throughout the entire innovation lifecycle. 100M+ users trust Miro Leadership Leadership Andrey Khusid Andrey Khusid CEO and Co-founder CEO and Co-founder Jeff Chow Jeff Chow Chief Product & Technology Officer Chief Product & Technology Officer Justin Coulombe Justin Coulombe Chief Financial Officer Chief Financial Officer Norman Gennaro Norman Gennaro Chief Revenue Officer Chief Revenue Officer Yuliya Malysh Yuliya Malysh Head of Self-service and Growth Head of Self-service and Growth Melinda Thompson Melinda Thompson Chief People and Legal Officer Chief People and Legal Officer Grisha Pavlotsky Grisha Pavlotsky Chief Transformation Officer Chief Transformation Officer Aileen Duplantis Aileen Duplantis Chief Marketing Officer Chief Marketing Officer Some of our investors and advisors Some of our investors and advisors Elena Verna Former SVP Growth, SurveyMonkey, Malwarebytes Des Traynor Founder and CSO, Intercom Quentin Clark Former CTO Dropbox, SAP, CVP Microsoft Daniel Dines Founder and CEO, UIPath Andrew Filev Founder and CEO, Wrike Alex Estevez Former CFO, Atlassian Sherali Karimov Former Head of EMEA Optimizely, Atlassian Irene Au Design Partner at Khosla, former Head of UX at Google, Yahoo Bradley Horowitz VP Product, Google Bob Muglia Former CEO, Snowflake and President, Microsoft Olivier Pomel Founder and CEO, Datadog Henrik Kniberg Minecraft, former Agile Coach at Lego and Spotify Jake Knapp Former Design Partner at GV, founder of Google Meet Stephen Curry Golden State Warriors, 2x NBA MVP, NBA Finals MVP, 4x NBA Champion Miro backed by Miro backed by Our offices are all across the world. Join us! Our offices are all across the world. Join us! Pricing May 19 Canvas 26 registration is open. Get set to transform how your team builds with AI. SAVE YOUR SPOT San Francisco Pricing Free Discover what Miro can do for you and your team. Always free $ 0 Unlimited members Go to dashboard What’s included: One workspace with 3 editable boards Create and share 3 boards, with Docs, Tables, Slides, and Timelines 5,000+ templates Start faster and enhance productivity with 5,000+ Miro and community-made templates 160+ apps and integrations Seamlessly integrate your workflows with 160+ apps, including Zoom, Slack, Google Drive, and Sketch Layers Use layers to show, hide, and group objects on the same board 10 Miro AI credits/month per team Create, edit, and synthesize board content with Miro AI 5 Talktracks - interactive video recordings Record and share interactive video walkthroughs of boards, browser, and whole screen Show key features What’s included: One workspace with 3 editable boards Create and share 3 boards, with Docs, Tables, Slides, and Timelines 5,000+ templates Start faster and enhance productivity with 5,000+ Miro and community-made templates 160+ apps and integrations Seamlessly integrate your workflows with 160+ apps, including Zoom, Slack, Google Drive, and Sketch Layers Use layers to show, hide, and group objects on the same board 10 Miro AI credits/month per team Create, edit, and synthesize board content with Miro AI 5 Talktracks - interactive video recordings Record and share interactive video walkthroughs of boards, browser, and whole screen Starter Unlock unlimited and private boards with essential features $ 8 /mo per member /mo per member Billed annually or $ 10 if billed monthly. Learn more ISO/IEC 27001 ISO/IEC Security Management SOC 2 Type II SOC for Service Organizations SOC 3 SOC for Service Organizations NIST National Institute of Standards and Technology TISAX Trusted Information Security Assessment Exchange GDPR General Data Protection Regulation Education Support for staff and students of educational institutions. Learn more Frequently asked questions How do I get started? When you sign up, you’re on the Free plan by default. The Free plan is designed for teams just starting out with visual collaboration: you can invite as many team members and create as many boards as you want, but only 3 boards will be active and editable at once. For more advanced collaboration functionality, check out our Starter, Business or Enterprise plans. What is included with the Free plan? The Free plan enables you to experience the power of visual collaboration firsthand: with unlimited team members, 3 active boards, and access to all our pre-built templates as well as a set of robust integrations including Google Drive, Slack, and more. Can I change the team size? Yes, you can change your team size at any point during your subscription. You’ll be charged a prorated fee for adding new users and you can schedule to remove licenses which takes effect on your renewal date. How can I increase Miro AI credits? Miro AI credits are calculated based on the number of licenses in the organisation and your Miro plan (Starter/Business/Enterprise). You can purchase an add-on to get additional credits. Credit limit cannot be increased for Free plan. Check out our help center for more information. Does everyone need a Miro account to collaborate? No, if you are using Miro on Starter or Business plan, you can invite anonymous visitors to your public boards. Learn more . Does Miro integrate with my existing workflow? We have a full list of integrations through our Marketplace here. If you don’t see a tool for your workflow on the list or have an idea, let us know . Is my data secure? We care deeply about data privacy and security and strive to keep our security practices industry-leading. Learn more about data security on our website, check out our assessment on the Cloud Security Alliance website, or contact us directly with any questions. We need additional help on documentation (like an MSA or security questionnaire). Who can I reach out to? We’re happy to work together on your company’s security questionnaire or an MSA! Please reach out to our sales team at miro.com/contact/sales for specific questions. My team is a nonprofit organization. Is special pricing available for NPOs or charitable organizations? If you're part of a nonprofit organization, we're happy to provide you with discounted pricing. Find out more about the eligibility requirements. What forms of payment do you accept? We accept all major credit cards. If you purchase Starter Plan for 10+ members or Business Plan you can pay via self-serve invoice. If you want to purchase Enterprise Plan, contact us , and we will issue an invoice that you can pay via bank transfer. I am a staff member or student of an educational institution. To apply for a free Education account, fill out the application form on our website. Learn more .
